GenericErrorResponseModel.description: Generic error response. The message will provide more details about the error.

httpCode.description: The HTTP status code of the error response.

httpMessage.description: The HTTP status message of the error response.

message.description: A human-readable error message, useful when no message translations are available

messageTranslations.description: A map of language codes to human-readable error messages, for clients that can use them.

CentralAuthSessionProvider-Session.description:
MediaWiki Session ID cookie.
Note: Write operations using this method also require a CSRF token to be submitted in the request body.
CentralAuthSessionProvider-Session.name: abstractwikiSession

CentralAuthSessionProvider-Token.description:
MediaWiki User Token cookie.
Required for persistent session verification.
CentralAuthSessionProvider-Token.name: abstractwikiToken

CentralAuthSessionProvider-UserID.description:
MediaWiki User ID cookie.
Required alongside the session ID.
CentralAuthSessionProvider-UserID.name: abstractwikiUserID

parameters.description: ZID of the function to call
parameters.name: zid

parameters.description: Pipe-separated list of arguments to pass to the function, in the order in which its arguments are declared, with each argument URL-encoded
parameters.name: arguments

schema.description: The result of evaluating the function call

type.description: The ZID of the type of the evaluated output: 'Z6' for a plain string, 'Z89' for an HTML fragment

value.description: The evaluated output as a string; either a plain string (for Z6) or an HTML fragment (for Z89)

Cache-Control.description: Dictates caching behavior for a browser, letting it know how often to refresh locally stored resources.

get.description: Call a function, with custom parse and render languages

parameters.description: ZID of the function to call
parameters.name: zid

parameters.description: Pipe-separated list of arguments to pass to the function, in the order in which its arguments are declared, with each argument URL-encoded
parameters.name: arguments

parameters.description: BCP-47 language code used to parse string-valued arguments that have a parser function; defaults to 'en'
parameters.name: parselang

parameters.description: BCP-47 language code used to render the function's output and any error messages; defaults to 'en'
parameters.name: renderlang

schema.description: The result of evaluating the function call

type.description: The ZID of the type of the evaluated output: 'Z6' for a plain string, 'Z89' for an HTML fragment

value.description: The evaluated output as a string; either a plain string (for Z6) or an HTML fragment (for Z89)

Cache-Control.description: Dictates caching behavior for a browser, letting it know how often to refresh locally stored resources.

parameters.description: Pipe-separated list of ZIDs to fetch, with a maximum of 50 per request
parameters.name: zids

parameters.description: BCP-47 language code to use when resolving multilingual labels in the returned ZObjects; if omitted, all languages are returned
parameters.name: language

parameters.description: Whether to additionally return the ZObjects referenced as types in the keys or arguments of the requested ZObjects
parameters.name: getDependencies

additionalProperties.description: A ZObject serialised as a JSON string, as returned by the page-content representation endpoint

schema.description: A map from each requested (and, if getDependencies is set, dependency) ZID to its ZObject serialised as a JSON string

Cache-Control.description: Dictates caching behavior for a browser, letting it know how often to refresh locally stored resources.

parameters.description: Pipe-separated list of ZIDs to fetch, with a maximum of 50 per request
parameters.name: zids

parameters.description: Pipe-separated list of revision IDs, one per requested ZID, to fetch historic versions; if omitted, the latest revision of each ZID is returned
parameters.name: revisions

parameters.description: BCP-47 language code to use when resolving multilingual labels in the returned ZObjects; if omitted, all languages are returned
parameters.name: language

parameters.description: Whether to additionally return the ZObjects referenced as types in the keys or arguments of the requested ZObjects
parameters.name: getDependencies

additionalProperties.description: A ZObject serialised as a JSON string, as returned by the page-content representation endpoint

schema.description: A map from each requested (and, if getDependencies is set, dependency) ZID to its ZObject serialised as a JSON string

Cache-Control.description: Dictates caching behavior for a browser, letting it know how often to refresh locally stored resources.
